rulings.Case Title: BOBBY SISK ET AL VS. EL BETHEL ARMS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set Four
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 26, 2017 line 1. CROSS COMPLAINANT EL BETHEL ARMS, INC. and EL BETHEL TERRACE, INC.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set Four GRANTED. Documents responsive to Request for Production 53 shall be produced by September 28, 2017. Parties to meet and confer re: protective order. Moving party to present a proposed order in conformity with the tentative ruling (opposing party to review and approve as to form) at the hearing. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BOBBY SISK ET AL VS. EL BETHEL ARMS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cross Complainant Christian Church Homes' Motion To Compel Production Of Documents From El Bethel Arms & El Bethel Terrace, Inc. (Per 8/30/17 Ost; Ex Parte Papers Are Moving Papers)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 26, 2017 line 1. Cross Complainant Christian Church Homes' Motion To Compel Production Of Documents From El Bethel Arms & El Bethel Terrace, Inc. OFF CALENDAR, Order entered on September 22, 2017. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TALIA ROOT VS. ESTATE OF HENRY PLANEL AN INDIVIDUAL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 26, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANTs MEI PLANEL and ESTATE OF HENRY PLANEL's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Demurrer to the fifth and sixth cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. These causes of action are barred by the applicable statute of limitations. Allegations on the face of the complaint show that Plaintiff's were aware of the facts giving rise to their claims at least 18 months before the action was filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HENRY LUCERO VS. ANTONIO MORENO HERNANDEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Judgment; Proposed Response; Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 26, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT JORGE LUMBRANO's Motion To Vacate Judgment GRANTED in part. The judgment for possession of the premises is vacated to the extent it is applicable to Jorge Reyna Lumbrano. The judgment money and possession remains in effect against the named Defendant and any other "occupants," if any. Lumbrano shall file answer and post $2,484.72 with the Court no later than September 26, 2017 by 4:00 p.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD SHIN VS. WALTER CORTEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Declared The Prevailing Parties And For Costs And Attorney'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 26, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTs ERICA DIAZ and NICOLAS MARTINEZ's Motion To Be Declared The Prevailing Parties And For Costs And Attorney'S Fees Granted in part and denied in part. Defendants are the prevailing parties for the purposes of cost award. Defendants are entitled to recover $855.05 per their Memorandum of Costs filed on July 24, 2017. Defendants' motion for attorney's fees is DENIED. The costs do not include the attorney's fees as there is no statute or contractual provision specifically providing for attorney's fees in addition to other costs. CC 1717. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JIM JOHNSON VS. LISA BLACKWELL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 26, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT LISA BLACKWELL's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer by the Plaintiff in his capacity as an assignee of all rights under the sub-lease, i.e. master tenant. Plaintiff is not engaging the in a debt collection within the meaning of FDCPA or Rothensal Act. Star is not an indispensable party. = (501/REQ)
